# GlobeScope

This website (globescope.netlify.app) is a web application that provides country information, search, and exploration features.

## Purpose
GlobeScope helps users explore countries, flags, population, currencies, and other geographical data in an interactive UI.

## Features
- Country search and filter
- Detailed country information pages
- Responsive UI for mobile and desktop
- API-based or local dataset support

## Technology Stack
- HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- React (if applicable)
- REST Countries API / local JSON data
- React Router for navigation

## Allowed Usage
- Public content indexing
- AI summarization of country data pages
- Educational use of geography-related content

## Disallowed Usage
- Personal or sensitive data scraping
- Abuse of API endpoints
- Unauthorized data harvesting

## Notes
This file is intended to guide LLM crawlers about how to interpret and use this website content responsibly.
